raw_consumer_statement:
b'Dispute and Financial Harm (XXXX XXXX XXXX)}
To
Citibank, N.A.
XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX
XXXX XXXX XXXX
XXXX XXXX, SD XXXX

CC: Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB)
Case # XXXX

Re: Citi / AAdvantage Platinum Select Account ending in XXXX
Citi Reference Number: XXXX
Disputed Amount: XXXX (XXXX)

Dear Sir or Madam,

I am writing this formal complaint to report serious mishandling, negligence, and unfair treatment by Citibank regarding my dispute for a XXXX charge from XXXX This matter has caused me severe financial hardship, stress, and business loss, despite the fact that I am not at fault.

Timeline and Facts of the Case:
1. I purchased an XXXX XXXX XXXX  from XXXX. Initially, the seller failed to provide a tracking number and delayed shipment information.
2. Due to the lack of tracking details and uncertainty, I timely filed a dispute with Citibank.
3. Only after I opened the dispute did XXXX  provide a tracking number and ship the items.
4. The LED screens arrived approximately 20 days late and were completely broken and unusable upon delivery.
5. I immediately notified Citibank and submitted clear photographic evidence proving the items were damaged on arrival.
6. I also contacted XXXX  and requested a UPS return label so I could return the damaged goods to XXXX and receive replacements.
XXXX never responded and provided no return solution.
7. Despite all evidence submitted, Citibank refused to issue a refund.

Unfair Delay and Financial Harm:

Citibank took over 90 days to respond, which caused me to miss the opportunity to file an insurance claim. This delay directly harmed me financially and removed all other recovery options. This conduct amounts to unfair practices and negligence.

Because of Citibanks failure to act responsibly:
 My business is currently suffering.
 I am facing serious financial difficulty.
 Making payments has become extremely hard.
 I have been left without funds for no fault of my own.

Legal Notice:

Due to this unjust handling, I am now preparing to take legal action in court. Please be advised that I will seek recovery of:
 The full disputed amount
 Attorney fees
 Court costs
 Any additional damages caused by Citibanks negligence

Citibank will be held responsible for all legal expenses, as this situation occurred entirely due to your failure to protect your cardholder.

I respectfully request:
 Immediate reversal of the XXXX  charge
 A written explanation of why my evidence was ignored
 Immediate resolution of this matter to avoid further legal escalation

Please treat this matter with urgency. I expect a written response without further delay.

Sincerely,
XXXX XXXX
XXXX XXXX XXXX'
